Penetration Testing Execution Standard: 7 fase pentest profesional.
RESEP MASAK standar internasional. 7 fase: Pra-E sampai Reporting.
ATURAN MAIN. Rules of Engagement: target, waktu, metode.
LAPORAN KOKI. Teknis + eksekutif, temuan + rekomendasi.
Fase 1 Pre-Engagement: NDA, RoE, SoW, Contract
Fase 2 Intelligence: OSINT, Shodan, passive recon
Fase 3 Threat Modeling: identifikasi aset, threat, attack tree
Fase 4 Vulnerability Analysis: scanning, manual validation
Fase 5 Exploitation: PoC, Metasploit, custom exploit
Fase 6 Post-Exploitation: persistence, data exfil, pivot
Fase 7 Reporting: executive summary, technical details, remediasi
